findings.eventstream_result: EMPTY - no SSE events delivered (same as #311)

content_length_fix.description: Removed Content-Length: 0 and Connection: keep-alive from template id=26
content_length_fix.effect: NO IMPROVEMENT - GOAWAY still terminates connection before SSE events

analysis.root_cause: H2 GOAWAY terminates the stream after 200 OK but before any SSE data frames are sent. Content-Length removal did not change this behavior.
analysis.recommendation: Switch to h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) + inject fake SSE event with warning message, OR use h2_hold_request=1 to hold and return HTTP 4xx before 200 OK is sent

notes: Screenshot capture failed due to Desktop Commander session context limitation. Visual confirmation: DeepSeek shows generic network error identical to #311.
